verdict_reasoning: TMED9 is a type I transmembrane protein exclusively localized to intracellular endomembrane compartments (ER, ERGIC, Golgi, post-Golgi secretory vesicles). Its role is in COPI/COPII-mediated vesicular transport and cargo recognition within the early secretory pathway. No documented cancer-state ecto-display, cell-death-induced externalization, tissue-restricted surface display, PM cycling, lysosomal exocytosis to PM, or stable surface-partner tethering. The protein body does not reach the outer leaflet of the plasma membrane.
